channel.title: Vinay Nair — Writing
channel.description: Notes from production — infrastructure, SRE, FinOps, and multi-agent AI. Incidents included.

item.title: Anatomy of an apex outage
item.description: How a leftover A record and an exact-match Route quietly sent my apex domain to a stranger's nginx — and what it taught me about DNS migrations, testing methods, and the order you remove things in.
